name: I'm on a mountain
hints: The mountain top with a sword. This weapon will be useful against enemies.
GET SWORD - you will need it to defeat the cyclops in the underground cave system.
Take the sword and go DOWN to return to the island. The sword is one of the key combat items in the game.
notes: Mountain top on the small island. Contains the sword, which is needed to defeat the cyclops guarding the cave in the pit. Down returns to the island (room 14).
